code: @Manual{,   title = {otndata: Access Ocean Tracking Network Data},   author = {Michael O'Brien},   year = {2026},   note = {R package version 0.0.0.9000},   url = {https://otndata.obrien.page}, }

title: Access Ocean Tracking Network Data
text: otndata wrapper around Ocean Tracking Network’s Plone content management system setup. Ocean Tracking Network (OTN), Atlantic Cooperative Telemetry Network (ACT), Pacific Islands Region Acoustic Telemetry Network (PIRAT), Northeast Pacific Acoustic Telemetry Network (N-PACT) nominally supported, things might work depending structure network optional add-ins used. , bug reports really, really, really appreciated!!

title: Access Ocean Tracking Network Data
text: can install development version otndata GitHub :

title: Access Ocean Tracking Network Data
text: things can accessed without logging . nodes come pre-baked statistics widget project map: Alternative text description widget enabled, can access information shown without needing log . can also query projects according code, country origin, species, institution, node, point contact. ’ll likely need log access parts CMS. can set username password system using otn_set_credentials helper function. , can just log using otn_login. package meant interface node’s Plone instance. can switch using server argument. List project’s files: , just grab ones modified recently using since argument: can download file via URL. BIG work progress API likely change multiple times coming weeks.

title: Return files associated with an OTN project — .otn_files
text: project Character. project code. server Character. URL OTN-style Plone server. Defaults main OTN server https://members.oceantrack.org. since Character. Filter files modified since date (YYYY-MM-DD format). batch_size Numeric. number results return. Defaults 25. type Character. Portion URL representing data type wish return.

what: Install your OTN username and password in your .Renviron File for repeated use — otn_set_credentials

title: Set the OTN Plone instance with which you wish to interact. — otn_set_server
Set the OTN Plone instance with which you wish to interact. — otn_set_server
text: server Character. Lowercase network code desired server. One "otn", "act", "npact", "devel" (OTN development server). Note "etn", "fact", "glatos" accepted, produce error redirect .
